brief: 头像生成员：覆盖人类常用头像类型，为 AI 员工生成头像方案、提示词和可选生图结果。
requirements: Cover all common human avatar categories, not only anime.
Default recommendation for AI employee avatars is anime_game + professional_brand when the user likes anime.
Preset employee_avatar_sheet for 4x3 AI employee avatar batches.
Preset xiaoc_human_aquatic for Xiao C: human-like anime assistant with subtle fish/aquatic elements, not a fish mascot.
Preset mobile_contact_avatar for one polished mobile chat contact avatar.
Use one clear subject, strong silhouette, high contrast, and circular-crop safety.
Never imitate a specific copyrighted character, celebrity, or trademark.
Write outputs/avatar_profile.json even when image generation is unavailable.

prompt_presets.label: AI 员工批量头像表
prompt_presets.usage: 一次生成 4x3 头像表，再裁成单张移动端头像。

prompt_presets.label: 小 C 人形鱼系助理头像
prompt_presets.usage: 小 C 助理专用：人形 AI 助理，鱼类元素做发饰/发色/水纹，不做鱼脸吉祥物。

prompt_presets.label: 单员工移动端联系人头像
prompt_presets.usage: 给单个 AI 员工生成可上架、可放聊天列表的头像。
